scripts.build: next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try{fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});}catch(e){} if(!fs.existsSync('out')){console.error('build: next build 후 out/ 가 없습니다'); process.exit(1);} fs.cpSync('out','dist',{recursive:true}); console.log('build: out/ → dist/ 복사 완료');"
